rationales.00ed4d133a94d53218136e80503c2944: Explores the use of blood neurofilament light levels as a biomarker to predict progression following anti-CD20 therapy in clinical trials.
rationales.1a6420577881a2020d502068c6e79515: Delves into the molecular pathology of B cells, linking clonally expanded B cells to EBV and specific autoantigens, offering deeper mechanistic understanding.
rationales.4fb7708fcb3724fb319dc34bce860aca: Investigates the impact of extended rituximab dosing intervals and variable B-cell repopulation dynamics, a specialized clinical consideration.
rationales.791aef5765eb7dbc1213d5b6a7c6baf7: Systematically reviews real-world effectiveness and safety of ocrelizumab, providing deeper clinical insights beyond trials.
rationales.81f301ab327c6b3c10d8b23878f382d3: Focuses on the specific and critical safety considerations for rituximab use before and during pregnancy.
rationales.8f74f55a5ffdbf102e55a123fa031090: Establishes the foundational understanding of B-cells as key disease drivers and therapeutic targets in MS.
rationales.b5e4140f626ba592e0f8040b9e63f18c: Provides a broad overview of B-cell therapy, highlighting its emergence and efficacy across different MS forms.
rationales.c64b243a85cfddaecd548fbccfea7f49: Offers a comprehensive and up-to-date review of anti-CD20 therapies, covering their pathology and clinical application.
rationales.dd050edd43edfb032001cbd6c46d638c: Presents pivotal trial evidence for rituximab, demonstrating the efficacy of B-cell depletion in relapsing-remitting MS.
rationales.e282f2652742424da88d0cf4e51eca8b: Gives an overview of monoclonal antibodies in MS, emphasizing important safety and risk management considerations relevant to B-cell therapies.

rationales.0dbb5d2a3d85d5e2ae182b598ef6863c: This narrative review provides a broad overview of 'invisible symptoms' in MS, including bladder/bowel dysfunction, and their impact on quality of life.
rationales.36b6f797c345c00e237754d333659aed: This consensus statement outlines a structured approach to the assessment and management of bladder symptoms specifically in multiple sclerosis.
rationales.4b507897543694afd32a767f85057185: This paper comprehensively details the prevalence, impact on quality of life, and management strategies for neurogenic bowel dysfunction in MS patients.
rationales.81c82a503b253a715f6aece7c08f2bdc: This study investigates the prevalence and scope of various gastrointestinal symptoms and syndromes, including bowel dysfunction, in multiple sclerosis patients.
rationales.949df4217db0e4ad3260e0f2396a884f: This review provides a detailed understanding of clinical assessment and management strategies for lower urinary tract dysfunction in neurological patients, relevant to MS.
rationales.9c4fe72f3611a0b20da3dee38f56cd67: This paper explores the patient perspective on treatment satisfaction and the bothersome nature of bladder and bowel symptoms in multiple sclerosis, highlighting QoL impact.

rationales.1f099a26257999c215216ade9be0c56e: Investigates the specific role of PECAM-1 in stabilizing blood-brain barrier integrity and facilitating T-cell diapedesis during neuroinflammation.
rationales.4647e94d43b6056c2ec584a858b03319: Explores the active immune axis formed by B cell transit between the central nervous system and periphery in multiple sclerosis.
rationales.997b6f0dd02735d479d9dbb2298752dc: Examines the selective infiltration of Epstein-Barr virus-specific CD8 T cells into the brain, suggesting a virus-driven mechanism for CNS inflammation.
rationales.a3afa4b7bcf774a803b4118bcaf23f48: Reinforces the utility of blood neurofilament light chain as an accessible biomarker for monitoring MS disease activity and treatment response.
rationales.be8ee73d7234208eb47d6eb2fd8b8677: Provides a foundational understanding of how immune cells breach the blood-brain barrier in multiple sclerosis.
rationales.f6490731cc2485b8c5a48abcd08ba9df: Offers clinical guidance on utilizing neurofilament light chain as a biomarker for managing multiple sclerosis.
rationales.fc0d8c9249ff5851ee5b4a5028bdf9e1: Establishes the direct link between blood-brain barrier integrity, lymphocyte extravasation, and neurofilament levels as a biomarker in early MS.

rationales.13a8b0b158850424322ea68961935051: This review offers foundational understanding of microglia's role in CNS neuroinflammation and neurodegeneration in MS.
rationales.6054b7a4501e736e10cd63667cbcd1cc: This phase 2b trial demonstrates the safety and efficacy of tolebrutinib, a CNS-penetrant BTK inhibitor, in relapsing MS.
rationales.69454965c1bbf0799f3e2fc82178c664: This paper presents an early placebo-controlled trial of evobrutinib, a key BTK inhibitor in MS.
rationales.6ab243ce87f009bef30c91d659f804bc: This review provides a broad overview of Bruton's tyrosine kinase inhibitors for multiple sclerosis.
rationales.87335f365c779af1cea4c3e172c5cb23: This paper details the classification and clinical significance of chronic active lesions, central to understanding 'smoldering MS'.
rationales.96be9990629de69cbf217e0d0d3a083f: This paper provides deeper mechanistic insight into how BTK inhibition modulates B-cell–T-cell interaction and metabolism.
rationales.abd2317d673f30595736f38dbd7665f1: This paper investigates how activated microglia drive demyelination, providing a deeper understanding of a process BTKIs aim to mitigate.
rationales.b4edb101341ca99cbe8e816c2b026ac2: This study connects smoldering pathology to iron rim lesions as an imaging biomarker, relevant for assessing BTKI impact on chronic inflammation.
rationales.daa928e91ffdb9a2b096b43eac907503: This paper offers mechanistic insights into the roles of microglia and lymphocytes within smoldering lesions in MS.
rationales.eeacec868b4511093739cb3b1d64953a: This paper establishes the critical role of B cells in MS pathogenesis, providing a rationale for BTK inhibition.
rationales.f8e4a4f3eb0e944fa80dc7ce99567a25: This paper explores the role of CNS macrophages and microglia in progressive MS, a key target for CNS-penetrant BTKIs.

rationales.213dcd047c81784a185b5b8550fc8199: Investigates structural MRI correlates, including focal lesions and gray matter damage, linked to cognitive impairment in MS.
rationales.21fc977feae2d034b603cb7733ebd6c5: Explores a specific therapeutic intervention, testosterone administration, for preserving hippocampal function and addressing cognitive deficits.
rationales.248eb043211fd51a413f554d51f4502c: Examines the correlation between cognitive dysfunction and neurofilament light chain levels, a potential biomarker, in progressive MS.
rationales.55940e40ef228c539f3c4687a0caa5eb: Offers an overview of cognitive impairment's prevalence, impact, and the role of neuropsychological assessment and neuroimaging.
rationales.5c6eb5958ea2fb8239eab3372fbcdf33: Presents key recommendations for cognitive screening and management strategies in MS care.
rationales.602de8ec1be83948ae88f76db94194c3: Reviews the specific effects of menopause on cognitive disturbances in women with multiple sclerosis.
rationales.87b7474219a5662a93cf3d81d0ff23f9: Discusses the prevalence and specific patterns of cognitive dysfunctions observed in MS patients.
rationales.902ceb68b3b773271e54b818ed1661dc: Provides a comprehensive review of cognitive impairment in MS, covering prevalence, affected domains, and pathophysiological background.
rationales.ae690b0463b086e974631afe383e7c3d: Analyzes the influence of race and ethnicity on cognitive function in individuals newly diagnosed with multiple sclerosis.
rationales.c3459bbaa673a053c01b67c303aaa154: Focuses on the unique cognitive and psychosocial challenges faced by children and adolescents with MS.
rationales.df8167e4fdc5afa715e53bdaec4325d2: Explores the crucial relationship between cognitive deficits and their impact on everyday functional activities in MS.
rationales.e32be73c0910fbb3b7a32acbb371c26e: Describes the Multiple Sclerosis Performance Test (MSPT) as an innovative iPad-based tool for quantifying neuropsychological impairment.
rationales.f2111e1e0a7bdb2cf71ca08c581faae1: Delves into thalamic connectivity abnormalities and their specific implications for cognitive impairment in MS using advanced neuroimaging.
rationales.f884389e90667dc571cf072e0113d5d1: Introduces the Multiple Sclerosis Functional Composite (MSFC) as an integrated tool for assessing key clinical dimensions, including cognitive function.

rationales.29a5e523cb04dd327a6e5a9c6a22d025: Demonstrates the prognostic value of CSF neurofilament light chain and oligoclonal bands in radiologically isolated syndrome.
rationales.96751ecdaa29c743fd2017ef1166dcc1: Explains the inclusion of kappa free light chains and oligoclonal bands in the 2024 McDonald criteria for MS diagnosis.
rationales.9b280fde6874792c004e6b847bdaf1f6: Provides a critical review of blood neurofilament light chain as a biomarker for neuronal injury in neurological diseases.
rationales.a6904749e51b185ab55ca5084eb1cc55: Investigates the utility of NfL and glial fibrillary acidic protein (GFAP) in differentiating MS disease courses.
rationales.c036b8ea79fdc6cab8dda54892c64621: Establishes serum neurofilament light chain as a predictor of disease worsening and brain/spinal cord atrophy in MS.
rationales.c9d49452250fe97b7661e80b623c0de8: Offers a comprehensive review of emerging imaging and liquid biomarkers, including those beyond the core four, in MS.
rationales.ccbfe5e1af71bed9ba2a7355cd661cfc: Examines the independent prognostic value of oligoclonal bands in predicting a second attack in early MS.
rationales.d03770c799886673a34c90cef87c8e0a: Explores the combined prognostic potential of CSF neurofilament light chain and chitinase-3 like-1 in multiple sclerosis.
rationales.eb5a5bdc2622a6dbc7e8a235fd3b0965: Focuses on the specific application of serum neurofilament light chain as a biomarker in progressive multiple sclerosis.

rationales.0b086d9f48993f9ba88e615f9ee4fb2a: Presents an oestrogen receptor β ligand as a novel therapeutic approach to enhance endogenous functional remyelination.
rationales.11c27ea9f01509c73c8cb1649f773a43: Investigates the temporal course of acute axonal damage, showing its prominence in early disease stages.
rationales.3b559471b6d4c5b6fda99a35ae786419: Proposes the neural androgen receptor as a specific therapeutic target for stimulating myelin repair.
rationales.7541612a7ea49f1aa731f605c7158ffa: Identifies inefficient clearance of myelin debris by microglia as a specific mechanism impairing remyelination.
rationales.75b1b62c647536543a29ed425646c064: Expands the understanding of MS pathology to include significant cortical demyelination and diffuse white matter injury.
rationales.98c83ea8cdcd9c251d383978347cbb0e: Investigates niacin-mediated rejuvenation of macrophages/microglia as a strategy to enhance remyelination, especially in aging.
rationales.a5362c589fa6dbbdcc25b2d08bfe30c5: Reviews the fundamental processes of glial disease and remyelination in the central nervous system.
rationales.a60a8dc1da0c8d0193cfa13150c59b59: Examines the pathogenic implications of iron and zinc imbalances in chronic MS lesions, linking metals to demyelination and neurodegeneration.
rationales.ac493a2b3c0e1da06953d27942d421ff: Demonstrates that axonal damage occurs in acute MS lesions, challenging earlier views of myelin-sparing.
rationales.ae2b051d13e046a36e209c2b3d3073bc: Explores regional variations in remyelination failure, particularly in periventricular areas, and its link to neurodegeneration.
rationales.d38a701103dc736dc27650680dd6ed33: Offers in situ evidence for antibody- and complement-mediated mechanisms of myelin destruction in MS.
rationales.d6ec96bd4c56cb827b47625ed36f2318: Highlights the heterogeneity of MS lesions and its implications for understanding demyelination pathogenesis.
rationales.d7b34f0bd0767cafd5b0870ead62efe7: Shows early oligodendrocyte proliferation and differentiation in fresh lesions, indicating intrinsic repair attempts.
rationales.daa928e91ffdb9a2b096b43eac907503: Discusses the role of chronic inflammation and activated microglia in 'smouldering lesions' leading to ongoing demyelination and neurodegeneration.
rationales.e85b2b87a33d1ecdc3d9768135ac5d11: Provides a comprehensive overview of the pathological hallmarks of MS, including demyelination and axonal damage.
rationales.ffdc650801631b8452f2f3cb7e113810: Analyzes the balance between demyelination and remyelination in progressive MS, explaining repair failure in chronic disease.

rationales.08caccad9a0ca229a22f4550b3dc20a7: Presents a comprehensive, up-to-date overview of neuropsychiatric symptoms in MS, emphasizing the prevalence and impact of depression on quality of life.
rationales.0dbb5d2a3d85d5e2ae182b598ef6863c: Places mood disorders within the broader context of 'invisible symptoms' in MS, highlighting the need for a comprehensive management approach.
rationales.10b44f5497cbc0174a5d1ccda9b0e013: Provides a very recent overview of depressive symptoms, anxiety, and their significant impact on quality of life and treatment adherence in MS, linking to cognitive impairment.
rationales.1a0536159d73a4a67efe368ef57ed45f: Provides a comprehensive, evidence-based overview of the prevalence of depression and anxiety in MS, addressing a core aspect of the concept.
rationales.467a2a5906b10de1cb82ac3147e51155: Discusses the limitations of sNfL as a biomarker for neuropsychological status, including depression and anxiety, providing advanced insight into diagnostic tools.
rationales.602de8ec1be83948ae88f76db94194c3: Examines the specific impact of menopause and hormonal changes on symptoms like mood disturbances in women with MS, offering a specialized biological perspective.
rationales.669ba1b5949d8ddb24ebc16a6d1b015d: Offers essential evidence-based guidelines for the assessment and management of psychiatric disorders, including depression and anxiety, in MS patients.
rationales.902f15bf286b21b3305453ab8fc34a3d: Delves into the complex, dissociable relationships between depression, anxiety, and cognitive patterns, suggesting more precise models for treatment development.
rationales.ee043c45f5376a26956aa4650e6e0be2: Offers a foundational review of depression in MS, including its high prevalence and early interest in its relationship with drug treatments.

rationales.047a3285ade63589276df8c2ce31e345: Explains how disability accumulates in MS, distinguishing between relapse-associated worsening and progression independent of relapse activity.
rationales.06c920701576fcd81f79b9f241855fd7: Present a long-term follow-up study correlating T2 MRI lesions with disability progression in relapse-onset MS.
rationales.11e59101518325fa24258287bb9cf86b: Investigates the complex dynamics and heterogeneity of brain damage in MS, linking it to disease variability.
rationales.2086c7480d3d77f777ff4d7222e7359a: Demonstrates how chronic white matter lesion activity can predict clinical progression in primary progressive multiple sclerosis.
rationales.2202f12a53491be9581e74f27eb55741: Highlights neurodegeneration as the primary cause of irreversible neurological disability in MS.
rationales.38d65ed7107ec8b5091630cf4be49d20: Investigates the relationship between relapses and the accumulation of long-term disability in MS.
rationales.3a2347d83a80a060940934473939f3ab: Critically appraises the PIRA framework, discussing its utility and limitations in understanding MS pathobiology.
rationales.3bd9e8c227d3165966ef76c53ae2f761: Explores the concept of 'smouldering MS' as a primary driver of disease progression, challenging traditional views.
rationales.3be219c79ed6acd2d1696e3bbda3da2f: Introduces the updated phenotypic classification of MS, essential for understanding disease course categories.
rationales.753ba5e0dffbc730f4ff23d495623e9d: Offers insights into the clinical features and long-term outcomes of the progressive phase of multiple sclerosis.
rationales.790ccf8e06f3b5ed0a512f97e7776879: Proposes a modern, mechanism-driven framework for understanding MS progression as a continuous process.
rationales.891e0143fe813d9a76c3c27065d412a5: Provides a foundational understanding of the natural history and variable evolution patterns of multiple sclerosis.
rationales.a62e6867fd8fd089666cf7bd38d78f49: Presents emerging epidemiological trends and discusses the redefinition of MS clinical course.
rationales.a658576ea70fd9b436f25cc4b62a4c53: Analyzes the interdependence of inflammation and neurodegeneration in different MS stages, particularly in progressive forms.
rationales.c036b8ea79fdc6cab8dda54892c64621: Examines serum neurofilament light chain as a biomarker for predicting disease worsening and brain/spinal cord atrophy.
rationales.f5caf3b516e5ce50ec285c0e363c35d9: Provides pathological evidence from autopsy studies on lesion activity and its correlation with clinical severity in progressive MS.

rationales.047a3285ade63589276df8c2ce31e345: Delves into how disability is acquired (RAW vs PIRA) and how DMTs influence this, offering a deeper understanding of treatment impact.
rationales.17872ed3dfe1413dc47b2033f0d41a54: Explores the distinct pathogenic mechanisms and challenging treatment landscape for progressive multiple sclerosis.
rationales.20db80dea93c8c151c49cd2da9486c9a: Reviews DMT management for women with MS planning pregnancy, addressing a crucial and specialized clinical scenario.
rationales.37e44e24c83cfcbcb63c9211904fde32: Provides a broad overview of current and emerging DMTs and treatment strategies, setting the stage for the landscape.
rationales.5b8d7453124ad4527894c2bf0b1f0687: Presents a consensus on the importance of early and unrestricted access to high-efficacy DMTs, highlighting practical implications of the treatment shift.
rationales.7bb9dc37873ffa2e91d8bc18377c12c6: Emphasizes the importance of timely diagnosis and treatment to preserve brain health, providing a foundational rationale for early intervention.
rationales.9fc11e3fc64f3720e33ee86aeb01376b: Advocates for early treatment with high-efficacy drugs, reinforcing the modern paradigm shift in MS therapy.
rationales.c64b243a85cfddaecd548fbccfea7f49: Provides an in-depth look at anti-CD20 therapies, a major class of high-efficacy DMTs, from pathology to clinical application.
rationales.c661d94bf04f95e30c989a2928c1fd1d: Explores the critical debate between early highly effective versus escalation treatment approaches, central to the 'shift' in MS management.
rationales.dba97c9e6f0a34e828788addc92105e0: Addresses the complex, advanced topic of de-escalating or discontinuing DMTs, a critical aspect of long-term patient management.
rationales.e282f2652742424da88d0cf4e51eca8b: Offers a specialized overview of monoclonal antibodies, a significant class of DMTs, with emphasis on specific management considerations like pregnancy and risk.
rationales.e301a2244218a4c99ba9bd4e58008856: Discusses the multitude of high-efficacy DMT options and their mechanisms for treatment-naïve RRMS, crucial for understanding efficacy tiers.
rationales.e4504699d48505f44558a9364490370d: Discusses strategies for promoting remyelination, representing advanced therapeutic approaches aimed at repair beyond inflammation control.
rationales.eeacec868b4511093739cb3b1d64953a: Explains the essential role of B cells in MS pathogenesis, providing a foundational understanding of a key mechanism targeted by many high-efficacy DMTs.
rationales.f8e4a4f3eb0e944fa80dc7ce99567a25: Focuses on CNS macrophages in progressive MS, detailing specific cellular mechanisms and their implications for future therapeutics.

rationales.08b736a81bbcebdccc0b17c33bbc093b: This paper offers a comprehensive overview of EBV's role in MS, from molecular pathophysiology to imaging.
rationales.1a6420577881a2020d502068c6e79515: This paper demonstrates molecular mimicry by identifying B cells that bind both EBV EBNA1 and a CNS autoantigen.
rationales.2d5e7c2469c2831f2dba43c878d51c98: It highlights EBV infection as a prerequisite for MS, discussing its interplay with genetic and environmental factors.
rationales.40b2412b060a65cc34f4d790102d0f8c: This study provides early evidence of dysregulated EBV infection directly within the multiple sclerosis brain.
rationales.8260be4d16f19ad2df7970c2366e5852: It places EBV within the broader context of environmental risk factors for MS, emphasizing its epidemiological significance.
rationales.8fea31c9665a41051222994c9a4e1bac: This review explores the potential of EBV vaccines as a preventative strategy for multiple sclerosis.
rationales.997b6f0dd02735d479d9dbb2298752dc: It details a specific immunopathological mechanism involving EBV-specific CD8 T cells infiltrating the MS brain.
rationales.a1dd62c23bbcbc33afc0f5caaee0fb9e: This recent review provides compelling epidemiological and mechanistic evidence for EBV's causal role in MS.

rationales.08b736a81bbcebdccc0b17c33bbc093b: This paper offers a detailed look into the molecular pathophysiology of Epstein-Barr virus in MS, providing a deeper mechanistic understanding.
rationales.2b31bec83ae7e825b93027a8460c3550: This epidemiological update highlights the role of migration and geographical variations, supporting the strong influence of environmental factors.
rationales.2d5e7c2469c2831f2dba43c878d51c98: This very recent paper explores EBV as a prerequisite for MS, detailing its interplay with genetics and epigenetics, providing advanced insights into its mechanism.
rationales.6d8511824acdb4d016410b6f880a6f95: This paper specifically addresses non-infectious environmental factors, including migration and diet, providing a broad perspective.
rationales.8260be4d16f19ad2df7970c2366e5852: This paper focuses on infectious environmental factors and the hygiene hypothesis, complementing the non-infectious review.
rationales.94a5401cbe9b50e5fd1cc92c67e7282b: This umbrella review provides a comprehensive overview of various environmental risk factors for MS, making it an excellent starting point.
rationales.ca4ee3c12af2d85872592b930194b948: This systematic review examines how modifiable environmental factors like vitamin D and smoking influence MS progression, a more advanced aspect beyond initial risk.
rationales.cd29e813a01ae351213cd04d665b538b: This review introduces key environmental factors like vitamin D, smoking, and EBV, essential for a foundational understanding.
rationales.e8805cba8751e2897f427b6b4dde49c8: This study provides specific epidemiological evidence on racial/ethnic differences in MS incidence, linking them to factors like vitamin D levels.

rationales.06378984db2a72517ac5a0301d8a6c35: This paper identifies pervasive global barriers to early MS diagnosis, including resource limitations and the need for accessible education.
rationales.136e6c4da0c13ea236c366fb34541dc0: This paper explores challenges and recommendations for ensuring health equity and fairness in the context of wearable devices and digital health.
rationales.23b31e5ae980f7e08a8dab671ff0eb66: This paper provides a comprehensive overview of health disparities, inequities, and social determinants of health in MS in the US.
rationales.4d110195d3d5a270332afc6890c82433: It details how underrepresented minority and immigrant groups with MS experience higher comorbidity burdens, indicating a deeper health disparity.
rationales.5b8d7453124ad4527894c2bf0b1f0687: It highlights how reimbursement restrictions create barriers to early and unrestricted access to high-efficacy disease-modifying therapies.
rationales.8e4e807bc24e72840008d12b0f81dc3f: This paper details how race and ethnicity influence MS presentation and disease course, highlighting specific disparities.
rationales.94453b7cf5e2600787d77a2b649b7eb2: It addresses the critical issues of underdiagnosis, undertreatment, and worse outcomes for African American patients with MS.
rationales.a42aa062a9b9f8373c976fd5a0e131b8: It provides a broad epidemiological context for MS and explicitly calls for addressing healthcare disparities in diagnosis and treatment access.
rationales.aed83c9bd9b7103cf7b7c22bb51b4ee7: It offers population-based prevalence estimates by race, ethnicity, and geographic region, establishing the scope of disparities in MS.
rationales.dfdb25ae484eaab3b3a2553224cd9cbb: This study directly demonstrates the impact of health insurance coverage as a socioeconomic barrier to disease-modifying therapy use.
rationales.e3f8c9201d1d341c5fb6f4bc041e9a8b: It investigates the mechanisms by which individual and neighborhood-level social determinants of health contribute to disparate disability accumulation.
rationales.ea75402200858c1cfb4915ca6f3a1a0d: This paper offers a focused and recent analysis of health disparities in MS specifically among Hispanic and Black populations in the US.
rationales.eb6000ed7d2ff59b413a1cf6c5b27075: This study provides a specific example of how socioeconomic disparity is linked to accelerated retinal neurodegeneration in MS patients.

rationales.142c24ef36384e5335b52e9285f457fd: Explores a specific, emerging therapeutic approach (Virtual Reality-Based Therapy) and its effectiveness in reducing fatigue and improving quality of life.
rationales.1d745f5a6158839375124de9b91bf4f5: Presents a detailed algorithm for tailoring innovative therapeutic strategies specifically for MS-related fatigue.
rationales.730f37ee5280dd8a2485d8573094c34b: Introduces a widely used patient-reported outcome measure (MSIS-29) for assessing the impact of MS symptoms, including fatigue, on quality of life.
rationales.73217a0acca5463cc45270a2be46abaf: Provides a comprehensive overview of fatigue mechanisms, evaluation methods, and treatment approaches in MS.
rationales.8a66f5941e13d7c3b4770058c1ef189e: Offers an evidence-based meta-analysis of common interventions for managing MS fatigue, covering exercise, education, and medication.
rationales.ad0a2082551b7c5b35d8f1dcf2fb4ca1: Establishes the high prevalence and significant burden of fatigue in people with MS through a systematic review.

rationales.1b402784fc6580d3a67b8ec436beef0a: Explains MS as a complex trait resulting from the interplay of environmental factors and susceptibility genes, highlighting its non-Mendelian nature.
rationales.4fda7c4ebf1df9444efbc9911032644b: Provides a comprehensive overview of MS immunogenetics, including the identification of over 100 associated loci.
rationales.5f21f165276ba98755b1855a816d5961: Investigates how HLA genes influence clinical outcomes and disease phenotypes in diverse populations, extending beyond mere susceptibility.
rationales.69758ed9767f3bd58f1f4b80d6ebe630: Details the strong association of the MHC region, including specific HLA and non-HLA effects, with MS susceptibility.
rationales.7056e08d0029bd609d3f554f36847367: Summarizes the progress in mapping genetic risk and identifying environmental triggers for MS.
rationales.82e83be64352e206bb31d18e1213f117: Identifies novel non-MHC susceptibility loci and introduces the concept of epigenetic regulation in MS pathogenesis.
rationales.936e4eaff6e1046fc2642f018520a2b6: Demonstrates an advanced application of genetic findings (Mendelian randomization) to identify potential therapeutic targets for MS.
rationales.a15221b66fee8afd1a2f388d378de3d3: Focuses on the methodological aspect of imputing HLA polymorphisms, crucial for detailed genetic studies in the MHC region.
rationales.e2e2095e60a993f88584f7bb6cb2575d: Discusses the complex interplay between genetic, environmental, and lifestyle factors influencing MS risk and course.
rationales.e8805cba8751e2897f427b6b4dde49c8: Examines racial and ethnic disparities in MS incidence, suggesting complex gene-environment interactions like vitamin D levels.
rationales.e9e155dece4aba0cf17bcf2bd9ea6b1f: Explores the quantitative contribution of polygenic risk scores to MS susceptibility and phenotype, building on GWAS findings.
rationales.ffc9f0f13c6422bcc49ccdba548ce5b7: Establishes the fundamental role of genetic factors and immune mechanisms in MS susceptibility.

rationales.1d7a73f4a8a010b888dad41d335d2d1a: This paper discusses the 'inside-out' vs. 'outside-in' paradigms, providing insight into the initiating events of MS autoimmunity and self-tolerance breakdown.
rationales.1f099a26257999c215216ade9be0c56e: This paper details the molecular mechanism of PECAM-1 in stabilizing the blood-brain barrier and regulating T-cell diapedesis.
rationales.4647e94d43b6056c2ec584a858b03319: This paper explores the advanced concept of immunoglobulin class-switched B cells forming an active immune axis between the CNS and periphery.
rationales.6d8489df9953235b9db14617634bb7f4: This paper presents a genomic map of MS susceptibility, implicating specific peripheral immune cells and microglia.
rationales.7cc218c2a28e03eb000441efcf3bfa2a: This paper describes the detection of ectopic B-cell follicles in the meninges, highlighting a specialized aspect of CNS inflammation in progressive MS.
rationales.836eed21167b7034dca4476ac7aeca63: This paper outlines the autoimmune and inflammatory aspects of MS, including the interplay between immune and glial cells.
rationales.942f31d266a82b85ffa52f41a0e3c67e: This paper provides a specialized look at B cell-based therapies by differentiating CD19 and CD20 as therapeutic targets.
rationales.997b6f0dd02735d479d9dbb2298752dc: This paper investigates the specific role of Epstein-Barr Virus-specific CD8 T cells in driving an immunopathological mechanism in MS.
rationales.b5204c9bbf8e070f29221745d7c1a11e: This paper delves into the specific role of pathogenic CD8+ T cells, offering a deeper understanding of T cell involvement beyond CD4+.

rationales.87605002568aa9a771f02bf932771e43: Highlights neurodegeneration and axonal loss as key components of MS pathology and drivers of permanent disability.
rationales.891e0143fe813d9a76c3c27065d412a5: Discusses the natural history and traditional classification of MS, providing a unifying concept for its variable evolution.
rationales.9a3826e23c3ab8d5e0b9921dce93e546: Explores AI-driven reclassification of MS progression, offering a modern perspective on disease subtyping.
rationales.9fc9d533faa62165c7711535d2077ba2: Delves into the specific role of T cells in the autoimmune responses underlying MS and its animal model, EAE.
rationales.a62e6867fd8fd089666cf7bd38d78f49: Provides a current definition of MS as an inflammatory and neurodegenerative CNS disease, including epidemiological trends and clinical course.
rationales.c3636c40358adb4dbe25d929605d3668: Provides an overview of the pathophysiology of MS, emphasizing contributions from both autoimmune inflammation and progressive degeneration.
